text:
- **Coach = configurable policy**, not a persona. Default voice: dry, direct, sparse. Configurable at global/block/methodology/workout/override levels. [...] **3. Coach & context (settings that don't feel like settings)**
Where your goals, preferences, constraints, uploaded doctrine, and coach instructions live. Written in plain language ("keep sessions under 45 min", "bias hypertrophy 8 weeks", "don't make me catch up"). This is configuration-as-text, editable anytime, and it's the knobs behind every AI decision. [...] When you *do* want to talk to it (adjust the plan, ask why), there's a text/voice input — but it returns a **proposed change you can see and accept**, not chatter. The AI's output is almost always a *modification to the plan*, rendered as before/after, never a wall of encouragement.
